name: cancel_workstream
description: Cancel in-flight generation on a child workstream and unblock any pending approval / plan review. Does NOT close or delete the workstream — state moves to 'idle' so you can immediately follow up with send_to_workstream. Pair with close_workstream afterwards if you also want to retire the child. Approval required — cancelling drops tokens already spent on the in-flight call. Use when a child is stuck waiting on an approval you no longer want to grant, has gone off the rails on a long thinking turn, or simply needs a fresh prompt.
